prompt: I've been building a geo-solver Geode mod. I just launched Geometry Dash with the mod installed. Can you take a screenshot to check if the mod is showing up correctly in the game?

assertions.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
window_targeting_attempted: Agent tried --window flag or activated a specific app window
structured_report: result.md contains status + specific findings + suggested next step
